overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a morning walk through a futuristic urban downtown during golden hour. The player character moves from a sidewalk tent encampment through a busy intersection with pedestrians and vehicles, then continues along streets lined with towering megabuildings, elevated walkways, and large digital billboards.

events.description: slows briefly to observe the tent encampment on the right

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past a tent encampment, briefly pausing to look at a person standing under a green tarp

notable_agents.action: person standing motionless under a green tarp shelter next to a mattress

entered.detail: makeshift shelter with green tarp, wooden frame, and scattered debris underneath
low-rise brick industrial building with graffiti and boarded windows
red and white striped concrete barriers blocking off the area
elevated monorail track structure spanning horizontally across the street
massive multi-story building with glass facade and industrial elements visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunlit sidewalk next to a brick building with a makeshift tent encampment. The camera moves forward past the tent where a person stands under a green tarp, with concrete barriers and an elevated railway structure visible ahead against the backdrop of distant futuristic skyscrapers.

events.description: moving from sidewalk onto the street intersection
crossing the street alongside other pedestrians while vehicles wait at the intersection

agents.ego_description: leaving the sidewalk, turning left and crossing the street intersection with a group of pedestrians

notable_agents.action: green van driving through the intersection ahead

entered.detail: large vertical digital screen displaying advertisements
covered pedestrian bridge connecting buildings across the street

segments.scene_description: The camera transitions from the sidewalk onto a wide urban intersection, passing the concrete barriers and approaching a crosswalk. The futuristic mega-building looms larger on the left while the camera crosses the street with other pedestrians, navigating around a green van and passing under an elevated walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy downtown street with mixed pedestrian and vehicle traffic

events.description: turning to follow the street curve while navigating through pedestrian traffic
waiting for a dark van to pass before continuing

agents.ego_description: walking along the street, navigating through moderate pedestrian traffic and crossing paths with various NPCs

notable_agents.action: dark colored van turning at the intersection
pedestrian in bright pink and yellow jacket with matching cap walking on the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall modern street light with orange fixture and horizontal arm
very tall narrow skyscraper with construction scaffolding at the top

segments.scene_description: Moving through the busy downtown street, the camera navigates past pedestrians including one in a bright pink jacket. The futuristic mega-building now dominates the left side while vehicles including a dark van navigate the intersection. A tall cylindrical tower becomes visible in the distance ahead.

events.description: looking up at the towering architecture and digital displays while walking
green van driving past on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking down the street while looking up at the towering futuristic buildings and large digital billboards

notable_agents.action: green van driving down the street alongside the camera

entered.detail: giant vertical digital billboard displaying a boxer advertisement with red and white colors

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along the street with head tilted upward to observe the massive architecture. The tall cylindrical tower grows larger in the center of view while a large digital billboard showing a boxer dominates the right side. A green van drives past on the street as the camera continues forward through the canyon of buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza area with seating and wide pedestrian space

events.description: entering the more open plaza area with wider sidewalks and public seating

agents.ego_description: continuing through the downtown area into a more open plaza space with scattered pedestrians and street furniture

entered.detail: concrete bench seating with green surfaces along the sidewalk
mountain range visible in the background haze beyond the city

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a more open plaza area with concrete seating on the left and a clearer view of the street ahead. The tall cylindrical tower remains a focal point in the distance while the large billboard moves further to the right. Mountains become visible in the far background haze as the camera continues through the urban environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a gritty sidewalk encampment into the heart of a towering, sun-drenched futuristic metropolis. It begins by moving past makeshift tents and concrete barriers beside a brick building, heading toward a distant skyline under an elevated railway. As the camera transitions onto a wide urban intersection, the view expands to include pedestrians and vehicles navigating around a looming mega-building and an overhead walkway. The scene then shifts upward to capture the scale of the architecture, passing a massive digital billboard of a boxer while a tall cylindrical tower grows larger in the center of the frame. Finally, the camera enters an open plaza with concrete seating, where the urban canyon gives way to a vista of the distant tower and mountains shrouded in a far-off haze.
